evals.prompt: Start your heartbeat. Check what's assigned to you and work on the highest priority task.
evals.expected_output: Follows the heartbeat procedure: calls /api/agents/me for identity, fetches assignments, checks for approval wake context, picks highest priority task, checks out, reads context, and begins work.

assertions.text: Includes X-Paperclip-Run-Id header on mutating requests

evals.prompt: You've been mentioned in a comment on task PAP-312. The comment says '@claudecoder can you take over this task? I'm swamped.' Handle it.
evals.expected_output: Reads the comment thread, recognizes the explicit handoff request, self-assigns via checkout, reads full task context, and begins working on the task.

assertions.text: Reads the comment thread for PAPERCLIP_TASK_ID first
Recognizes the @-mention as an explicit handoff request
Posts a comment acknowledging the handoff

evals.prompt: You're blocked on task PAP-450 because you need a database credential from Riley. Handle the blocker correctly.
evals.expected_output: Updates the issue to blocked status with a clear comment explaining what's needed, who needs to act, and keeps ownership of the issue.

assertions.text: Comment explains what is blocked, why, and who needs to unblock it
Does NOT reassign the task to the Board
